content: Hi all, apparently the Great Suspender, a very handy Chrome extension I've been using, has been shut down by Google store. Does anyone know of a decent alternative for tab management and suspension?
Maybe someone will fork it and upload it to the google play store. I am too lazy to do so myself

Yeah, there is one. I've also found sources saying that Chrome installed a built-in feature called Tab Freeze relatively recently which theoretically does what I needed Great Suspender for, so I'm going to have a run without anything and see how it copes.
